title: Do you use pyhf? We need your input!

posts.name: Kirill Skovpen
posts.text:
Dear CMS users,
We are collecting information on various use-cases of the pyhf statistical tool in our collaboration, which will be summarized during the upcoming pyhf workshop at CERN, Dec 4-8: https://indico.cern.ch/event/1294577/overview.
If you use pyhf at any step of your analysis workflow, could you please get in touch with me?
We would highly appreciate any prompt feedback.
Thanks,
Kirill (also for Clemens and Giulio)
posts.cooked_html:
Dear CMS users,

We are collecting information on various use-cases of the pyhf statistical tool in our collaboration, which will be summarized during the upcoming pyhf workshop at CERN, Dec 4-8: https://indico.cern.ch/event/1294577/overview.

If you use pyhf at any step of your analysis workflow, could you please get in touch with me?

Kirill (also for Clemens and Giulio)
